title: saxifraga alpina
intro: Saxifraga alpina, also known as rock jasmine or alpine saxifrage, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as dyspepsia and gastritis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic agent. Saxifraga alpina is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
